channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Results in Three Deaths and Multiple Illnesses
item.description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, a polar cruise ship operated by Dutch company Oceanwide Expeditions, has resulted in three fatalities and several other passengers falling ill. The W...

item.title: Tushar Mehta Criticizes 'Bully' Judges in New Book
item.description: In his upcoming book, ‘The Bench, the Bar and the Bizarre’, Solicitor General of India, Tushar Mehta, sharply critiques the conduct of certain judges, accusing them of abusing their power and displayi...

item.title: NASA Explores Using Drones to Study Martian Volcanic Caves for Signs of Life
item.description: Orpheus is a proposed NASA mission that aims to explore volcanic fissures and caves in the Cerberus Fossae region of Mars using advanced drones. Following the success of Ingenuity, the first helicopte...

item.title: Israeli police arrest man for attacking nun near Jerusalem's Old City amid reports of rising incidents against Christians
item.description: Israeli police have arrested a 36-year-old man suspected of attacking a nun near David's Tomb outside Jerusalem's Old City. The incident, which occurred on Wednesday, was captured on video and describ...

item.title: Scuba Diving's Influence on Leadership: Lessons Learned Over 50 Years
item.description: Dane Hudson, head of Impactful Leadership, shares insights from over 50 years of scuba diving experience that shaped his approach to leadership. After obtaining his PADI certification and diving in th...

item.title: Fire causes significant damage in Sandy Beach, triggering evacuation alert
item.description: A wildfire has caused significant destruction in the Summer Village of Sandy Beach, located about 65 km northwest of Edmonton. The fire, which began on Saturday, has already destroyed three homes and ...

item.title: Nine members of three families perish in Shahdara Vivek Vihar fire, relatives in grief
item.description: A tragic fire broke out on Sunday in a four-storey residential building in Vivek Vihar, Shahdara, east Delhi, claiming the lives of nine people from three families. Scenes of deep grief were reported ...

item.title: Suaalii’s Twickenham debut sets high expectations amid early career challenges
item.description: Joseph-Aukuso Suaalii’s recent performance for the Waratahs against the Western Force in Sydney was subdued, reflecting both team tactics and his own recent injury setbacks. The Force cleverly restric...

item.title: A deeply intimate portrayal of history through a mother-daughter bond in ‘Last Song Before Home’
item.description: Indira Das’s ‘Last Song Before Home’ is a novel that blends personal memoir with the sweeping history of India, translated from Bengali by Bina Biswas. The book begins as a tribute to the author’s mot...

item.title: Man sustains serious injuries after falling inside Birmingham building
item.description: Police in West Midlands are investigating an incident in Birmingham city centre in which a man fell multiple floors inside a building, sustaining serious injuries. The event occurred on Sunday evening...

item.title: One dead and two injured in early morning shooting outside Florence-Firestone strip mall
item.description: A shooting early Sunday morning in the unincorporated Florence-Firestone area of Los Angeles County left one man dead and two others injured, according to authorities. Deputies from the Los Angeles Co...

item.title: India dismisses Nepal’s territorial objections over Kailash Mansarovar Yatra route via Lipulekh
item.description: India has firmly rejected Nepal’s objection to the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra being conducted through the Lipulekh Pass in Uttarakhand, stating that Kathmandu’s territorial claims over the region are ne...

item.title: Maritimes face heavy rain, strong winds, and possible snow as storm approaches
item.description: Atlantic Canadians are being warned of significant storm conditions as a low-pressure system moves into the Maritimes. Environment Canada has issued weather warnings for mainland Nova Scotia, Prince E...

item.title: KZN boxing federation calls for township mega gym to support young fighters
item.description: The chairperson of the KwaZulu-Natal Boxing Federation, Sandile Vilakazi, has urged Sports, Arts and Culture Minister Gayton McKenzie to support the creation of a large, shared boxing facility in Durb...

item.title: DPWH initiates review of the nearly 50-year-old National Building Code
item.description: Public Works Secretary Vince Dizon has directed the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) to undertake a comprehensive review of the National Building Code, officially known as Presidential D...

item.title: Yobe APC Leaders Reject Wali’s Endorsement, Rally Behind Bomai for Governorship
item.description: Some big men and chieftains of the All Progressives Congress (APC) for Yobe State don yan say dem no gree the endorsement of Baba Malam Wali as consensus governorship candidate. Dis kin decision wey f...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Life on Earth: David Attenborough’s Pioneering Wildlife Documentary
item.description: Marking the 50th anniversary of Life on Earth and celebrating Sir David Attenborough’s 100th birthday, Making Life on Earth: Attenborough’s Greatest Adventure offers a vivid and entertaining look at t...

item.title: Ask.com and Jeeves Shut Down After 30 Years of Service
item.description: After almost 30 years, Ask.com, once a pioneer in search engines, has officially shut down, marking the end of an era for its famous mascot, Jeeves. The company, which began as Ask Jeeves in 1996, was...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius cruise ship leads to three deaths and intensive care case
item.description: A suspected virus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean has resulted in three deaths and several passengers falling ill. The vessel, operated by Oceanwide Expeditions and re...

item.title: India rejects Nepal’s claim on Lipulekh Pass for Kailash Mansarovar Yatra
item.description: The ongoing border dispute between India and Nepal has come into focus again with Nepal raising objections to India’s resumption of the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra through the Lipulekh Pass in Uttarakhan...
